136:97.notes: Treat Etna's March 1981 renewed activity as a one-off named-volcano event over the late-winter to early-spring post-prediction window.

182:19.notes: Treat Etna's March 1983 fissure eruption as a one-off named-volcano event over the short post-prediction hazard window.

150:133.notes: Treat the restart of a major Hawaiian eruption at the turn of 1982/1983 as a one-off named-volcano event.

238:7.notes: Treat the Unzendake eruption as a one-off named-volcano event in the short window before the 3 June 1991 dome emergence.

238:158.notes: Treat Etna's December 1991 flank eruption as a one-off named-volcano event over the post-prediction hazard window.

241:47.notes: Treat Cerro Negro's April 1992 eruption as a one-off named-volcano event in the immediate post-prediction season.

366:13.notes: Treat Asamayama's September 2004 eruption onset as a one-off named-volcano event in the immediate post-prediction window.

383:27.notes: Treat Talang's April 2005 eruption onset as a one-off named-volcano event over the short post-prediction hazard window.

400:3.notes: Treat Santa Ana's 1 October 2005 eruption as a one-off named-volcano event in the immediate post-prediction window.

444:3.notes: Treat Stromboli's late-February 2007 reactivation as a one-off named-volcano event.

453:24.notes: Treat Jebel at Tair's September 2007 eruption as a one-off named-volcano event over the post-prediction window.

464:4.notes: Treat Chaiten's May 2008 reawakening as a one-off named-volcano event in the immediate post-prediction window.
